payload.title: GitHub and UNDP team up to advance development priorities in Ghana with open source
payload.fact: GitHub and UNDP have formed a partnership to advance development priorities in Ghana using open source software.
supporting_evidence: GitHub and UNDP team up to advance development priorities in Ghana with open source

payload.title: Evaluating performance and efficiency of the GitHub Copilot agentic harness across models and tasks
payload.fact: GitHub conducted research evaluating the performance and efficiency of the GitHub Copilot agentic harness, a shared component of the GitHub Copilot SDK that powers multiple GitHub Copilot experiences.
supporting_evidence: Evaluating performance and efficiency of the GitHub Copilot agentic harness across models and tasks

The GitHub Copilot agentic harness is a single shared component of the GitHub Copilot SDK, which powers the GitHub Copilot CLI, GitHub Copilot app, and Copilot code review, along with a wide variety of experiences across GitHub and Microsoft
